title: feat: add OpenClaw setup integration (Pollinations as provider)
author: CloudCompile

gist.headline: The hive gets claws
gist.blurb: We've added a specialized OpenClaw model to our text endpoints, pre-prompted for agentic coding magic. Plus, a slick new setup script makes connecting your CLI an absolute breeze.
gist.summary: Introduced a specialized 'openclaw' model alias backed by Qwen3-Coder-30B, alongside a dedicated landing page and CLI installer for seamless provider integration.
gist.impact: Developers can now instantly configure the OpenClaw CLI to use Pollinations for automated coding workflows, complete with built-in tool-call sequencing and verification gates.
gist.visual_concept: OpenClaw implies a crab or claw motif. The scene should feature Polly the bee collaborating with a cute pixel art crab at a retro computer terminal, symbolizing the integration between Pollinations and the OpenClaw CLI.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny hacker hoodie, high-fiving a cute little red crab with chunky claws sitting on a retro computer keyboard. The glowing CRT monitor displays lime green (#ecf874) code blocks. Soft pastel gradient background of lavender and peach. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm and collaborative.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny hacker hoodie, high-fiving a cute little red crab with chunky claws sitting on a retro computer keyboard.
